contracts.stripeStatusMapping: Stripe subscription statuses map through mapStripeStatus per Q19: active and trialing → active; cancel_at_period_end → cancel_at_period_end; past_due and unpaid → past_due; canceled → canceled; unknown statuses → none.
contracts.webhookReplay: Webhook processing is idempotent via stripe_webhook_events: duplicate stripe_event_id is skipped; customer.subscription.updated activates the subscription row and recomputes entitlements.
